title: Spicy Gooey Cheese Toast
description: A crowd-pleasing, spicy and gooey Uruguayan dish featuring full fat sour cream on paleo-friendly toast.

ingredients.name: Full Fat Sour Cream
ingredients.notes: Use full fat to enhance the creamy texture

ingredients.name: Spicy Pepper Sauce or Hot Sauce (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a spicy kick, adjust as needed

ingredients.name: Full Fat Greek Yogurt
ingredients.notes: Optional for extra creaminess and tangy flavor

ingredients.name: Freshly Chopped Herbs (optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as parsley, chives or cilantro to add freshness

instructions: Toast the paleo bread until lightly golden brown and slightly crispy on both sides.
In a small bowl, mix together the sour cream, optional spicy pepper sauce, full fat Greek yogurt (if using), and salt. Stir well until smooth.
Spread the spiced sour cream mixture evenly over each slice of toast.
Top with fresh herbs for added freshness if desired.
